title: Busy Selling
description: Lounging in a leather chair with a retro phone — bold studio headline
scene_description: A glossy editorial studio portrait against a seamless warm pale-grey backdrop, lit with soft even daylight and gentle shadows. The subject lounges sideways and reclined in a low retro tan-leather sling chair with a black tubular-steel frame, body angled to the right, legs extended and crossed at the ankles toward the lower-right corner. One hand holds a vintage teal rotary-telephone handset up to the ear; the other arm rests over the armrest holding a brown takeaway coffee cup, conveying playful, overbooked confidence with a wide genuine smile. Wardrobe: oversized slightly-rumpled grey herringbone tweed blazer worn over a crisp white shirt with a loosened black skinny tie, paired with a short charcoal skirt or trousers, white crew socks and chunky black lug-sole loafers. Props on the floor at left: a teal rotary phone with coiled cord snaking up to the handset, a paper coffee tray with a second cup, scattered papers and a tablet. Camera: straight-on eye-level full-body shot, normal 50mm lens, no distortion. Palette: muted grey, warm tan, teal accent, charcoal. Mood: witty, premium, fashion-magazine satire of the hard-working hustle.
text_treatment: Massive ultra-bold condensed grotesque sans (Helvetica-Inserat / Druk-Wide feel), all-caps, near-black charcoal. Two stacked words filling the entire upper two-thirds: "BUSY" enormous across the very top spanning edge to edge, "SELLING" slightly smaller on the next line. Letters are tightly packed with minimal tracking; the seated subject overlaps and sits in front of the lower portion of the "SELLING" line so the type reads as a backdrop behind them. Same warm-grey background shows through the negative space of the letters.
clean_variant_note: Just the seamless warm pale-grey studio backdrop with the seated subject and props, completely empty above and around them where the giant BUSY / SELLING type used to be — no lettering anywhere.
subject_direction: Pose the agent reclined sideways in the tan sling chair, one hand holding the teal phone handset to the ear, other hand holding a coffee cup, legs extended and crossed, beaming a wide confident smile at camera. Keep their real face, hair and identity from the profile photo intact.

title: No Days Off
description: Reclined studio shot behind a giant elegant serif headline
scene_description: A clean studio set against a flat, seamless warm-grey (greige) backdrop and matching floor, no horizon line. Centred lower-third, the subject lounges sideways and reclined in a low-slung tan/cognac leather sling chair with a black tubular-steel frame, body angled to the left, legs extended diagonally to the right and crossed at the ankles. One hand holds a vintage teal rotary telephone handset to the ear; the other arm rests outward holding a brown kraft takeaway coffee cup. The corded teal phone base sits on the floor at lower-left beside a kraft coffee-cup carrier tray, a spilled second coffee cup, and a couple of scattered magazines/papers. Editorial fashion-photography mood: confident, playful, mid-laugh energy of someone too busy to stop. Camera is straight-on at near eye level, slightly low, medium-wide full-body framing with a normal ~50mm look and minimal distortion. Soft, even, bright studio lighting with gentle shadow under the chair; muted neutral palette of greige, charcoal, cognac leather, and a teal accent.
text_treatment: Three stacked words "NO" / "DAYS" / "OFF", left-aligned and huge, set in an elegant high-contrast serif (Didone/Bodoni-like, thin hairlines, sharp bracketed serifs) in all caps, dark charcoal near-black. The type fills the entire upper two-thirds of the frame as an oversized backdrop; lines are tightly leaded and span most of the width. The seated subject sits in front of and overlaps the lower "OFF" line, the head breaking across the baseline of "DAYS"/"OFF" so the figure feels layered into the typography.
clean_variant_note: Same greige seamless studio backdrop and floor, completely empty of any text, just smooth uninterrupted warm-grey wall behind the subject so headline type can be added later.
subject_direction: Pose the agent reclined sideways in the cognac sling chair, legs crossed and extended, mid-laugh and relaxed, holding a teal phone handset to the ear and a coffee cup in the other hand. Smart-casual oversized blazer over a shirt and tie, chunky shoes. Preserve the agent's real face exactly from their profile photo.

title: One Call Away
description: Crouched on a Paris-style street holding a red phone to camera
suggested_text: Want to invest? I'm one call away
scene_description: A vertical street-level portrait shot in a sunlit European-style boulevard: two rows of pale cream Haussmann-era stone apartment buildings with iron balconies recede sharply toward a bright sky with soft white clouds, the converging facades forming strong one-point perspective. The ground is grey cobblestone, slightly wet-looking, filling the lower third. The subject crouches/squats low and centered on the cobbles, body facing camera, one arm thrust dramatically forward toward the lens holding a vintage bright-red rotary telephone handset (slightly oversized by foreground perspective), the other hand lower down cradling the matching red rotary telephone base, a coiled red cord looping down to the wet stones. Wardrobe is all-black: a long open trench/overcoat over a dark shirt, slim black trousers, and polished black dress shoes. Shot on a wide-to-normal lens from a low camera height, eye-level-ish with the crouched subject. Bright natural midday daylight, crisp shadows, clean colour palette of cream stone, blue sky and one bold pop of red. Confident, cinematic, high-end editorial mood.
text_treatment: Massive ultra-bold condensed grotesque sans-serif in pure white, all caps, set in two stacked left-aligned lines that span nearly the full width of the frame across the upper-middle. Line one ("WANT TO INVEST?") sits behind/over the raised handset arm so the red phone and forearm overlap and partially cover the letters; line two ("I'M ONE CALL AWAY") sits just below at roughly the subject's chest height. Tight letter-spacing, heavy weight, slight integration where the figure passes in front of the type for depth. No outline or shadow, flat clean white. Re-render any replacement headline in this same giant white condensed all-caps two-line style.
clean_variant_note: Same boulevard, sky and crouched red-phone pose, but the upper-middle backdrop (street and facades) left completely empty of any text, clean negative space ready for fresh overlay type.
subject_direction: Pose the agent in a low confident crouch on the cobbles, facing camera, one arm boldly extended toward the lens holding the red handset, other hand holding the red phone base, calm assured expression with a slight smile, dressed all in black. Preserve the agent's real face exactly from their profile photo.

title: Touch The Sky
description: Sunny close-up in lime sunglasses reflecting the Burj Khalifa
suggested_text: We make your goals touch the sky
scene_description: A bright, optimistic outdoor portrait shot against a vivid blue sky scattered with soft white clouds, which fills the entire frame as the backdrop. The subject occupies the right half: an extreme close crop of the upper face down to the chin, head tilted very slightly, with a wide warm smile showing teeth. Hair is pulled back neatly off the face. The subject wears bold oversized chartreuse/lime-yellow square sunglasses; the lenses reflect the Burj Khalifa tower against sky, a deliberate Dubai cue. One small gold hoop earring is visible. Styling is minimal and clean, skin lit by bright natural daylight giving a glossy, sun-kissed sheen. Camera: tight telephoto close-up, eye-level, shallow depth focused on the face, subject cropped hard at the right edge so half the face sits off-frame. Lighting is high-key sunny daylight, no harsh shadows. Colour palette: saturated sky blue, white clouds, electric lime accent, warm gold. Mood: confident, aspirational, energetic, premium real-estate editorial.
text_treatment: Headline set in a heavy ultra-bold condensed grotesque sans, all caps, tightly stacked left-aligned in the upper-left over the sky. First three lines "WE MAKE / YOUR / GOALS" in deep navy; the payoff "TOUCH / THE SKY." in electric lime-green, slightly larger weight, terminal period included. Below sits a three-line subhead in bold navy sans, sentence case: "Prime properties. / Sky-high standards. / Real results." A short thick lime horizontal rule underlines the block. Type fills roughly the left third, large and dominant, never overlapping the subject's face.
clean_variant_note: Keep the entire left third as open blue sky with clouds and no type, navy or lime; remove the lime underline rule so the backdrop reads as empty sky beside the cropped face.
subject_direction: Pose the agent in an extreme right-side face crop, broad genuine smile with teeth, head level, hair pulled back, wearing bold oversized lime-yellow square sunglasses and one gold hoop, lit by bright daylight. Preserve the agent's real facial identity exactly from their photo.

title: Refined. Precise. Trusted.
description: Dark executive office, feet-up power pose reviewing documents
scene_description: A moody, cinematic executive-office interior shot for a luxury real-estate brand. The subject sits reclined in a high-back black leather executive chair behind a dark polished mahogany desk, body angled slightly toward camera in a relaxed-but-commanding power pose. One hand cradles a vintage white corded desk-phone handset to the ear/chin; the other arm extends to the side holding up a sheaf of printed contract documents, reviewing them. Framing is a wide medium shot, subject roughly centered and upper-mid, captured from a low/eye-level angle so an out-of-focus dark chair-back looms large in the extreme foreground, creating depth. Desk props: scattered papers, a white phone base with coiled cord, a document tray, a folder. Background: dark reflective lacquered wall panels, deep shadow. Lighting is dramatic chiaroscuro — a single soft key light rakes from the left, sculpting the face and white shirt while the rest sinks into rich blacks. Palette: charcoal, near-black, warm mahogany wood, crisp white, with a single deep burgundy accent (the tie). Editorial, expensive, film-still mood.
text_treatment: A single centered headline in an elegant high-contrast serif (Didone/Bodoni-like), all-caps, crisp white, with each word terminated by a period: "REFINED. PRECISE. TRUSTED." It sits as one line in the lower portion of the frame, below the seated subject, at a modest scale (roughly 5-6% of image height), generously letter-spaced, understated and luxury-editorial rather than dominating. Re-render arbitrary overlay text in this exact treatment: white Didone serif, all-caps, period after each word, single centered line near the bottom margin.
clean_variant_note: Same dark cinematic office scene with the lower-frame floor area left empty and shadowed (no type overlay), preserving negative space at the bottom where the white serif headline would normally sit.
subject_direction: Pose the agent reclined in the leather chair, one hand holding a white desk-phone handset to ear, other hand raising contract papers as if reviewing. Calm, assured, slightly serious expression; impeccable tailored pinstripe suit, white shirt, deep burgundy tie. Preserve the agent's real facial identity exactly from their profile photo.

title: Your Move
description: Pink fur coat over a giant chessboard — pop-art cool
scene_description: A bold, fashion-editorial portrait shot from a low, dramatic worm's-eye angle looking up across a black-and-white checkerboard chessboard that fills the entire foreground bottom. The subject sits behind the board, framed from waist up and centered, leaning slightly forward with chin tilted down and a cool, unsmiling, commanding expression. One arm reaches forward into the foreground, hand extended large and close to the lens (forced-perspective), fingertips poised on a glossy white pawn mid-move; a tall white queen chess piece stands prominently in the right foreground. The subject wears statement white cat-eye sunglasses and a plush, fuzzy hot-pink faux-fur coat with a wide collar. Backdrop: a bright sunny sky with crisp white cumulus clouds on the left and a flat mint-green building wall on the right, giving a playful surreal pop-art feel. Shot on a wide lens, high-saturation daylight, glossy magazine color palette of pink, mint green, sky blue, and crisp black-and-white.
text_treatment: A single centered headline reading "YOUR MOVE" in an ultra-bold, heavy-weight sans-serif (Helvetica/Akzidenz-style grotesque), all-caps, pure white with a soft drop shadow for legibility. It spans nearly the full image width as one line, placed across the vertical middle of the frame just below the subject's collar and above the chessboard, so the foreground hand and chess pieces overlap and partly cross in front of the baseline of the type, integrating the text into the scene.
clean_variant_note: Same scene with no text overlay: leave the mid-frame band across the pink coat and chessboard clear and uncluttered so a headline can be cleanly added later.
subject_direction: Pose the agent seated behind the chessboard, leaning in with chin slightly lowered, cool confident closed-mouth expression, wearing white cat-eye sunglasses and a fuzzy pink coat, one hand thrust toward the lens fingertips on a white pawn. Preserve the agent's real facial identity from their photo.

title: Brewing The Deal
description: Top-down café shot sipping from a teal mug
scene_description: A bold, editorial fashion-style portrait shot from a high, top-down angle with a wide-angle (fisheye-leaning, ~16-24mm) lens that exaggerates perspective, enlarging the head and hand closest to camera while the body and surroundings fall away below. The subject sits and tilts the face up toward the lens, sipping from a chunky matte teal-mint ceramic coffee mug held up to the lips with one hand; fingers wrap the cup, a chunky gold signet ring on one finger. Setting is a moody, retro tiled cafe or vintage bathroom-style interior: glossy teal-green square wall tiles, weathered wood cabinetry, a small window with frosted/textured glass spilling daylight in the upper background, and a patterned tiled floor below. Wardrobe is a tailored brown houndstooth/check blazer over a deep maroon shirt, smart-casual editorial styling. Warm earthy palette—browns, mint-teal, mustard, maroon—with soft natural window light, slightly desaturated film-grain finish and gentle vignette. Confident, magazine-cover mood.
text_treatment: Ultra-bold, heavy condensed grotesque sans-serif (Helvetica/Druk-style), all uppercase, pure white. Set as two stacked left-aligned lines filling the entire top third of the frame, edge-to-edge, tightly tracked with minimal leading so the block reads as a solid mass. Line 1 sits at the very top edge; line 2 directly beneath it. The subject's head rises up into and overlaps the lower baseline of the second line, so the type sits behind/around the figure. No drop shadow, flat white type over the photo.
clean_variant_note: Top third stays clean: just the tiled wall, frosted window light and empty backdrop with no type, so headline text can be added later; subject head still rises into upper area.
subject_direction: Pose the agent seated, face tilted up toward a high camera, sipping from a teal mug held to the lips one-handed, calm confident gaze into lens. Dress in a tailored checked blazer over a rich-toned shirt; optional tinted aviators and a gold ring. Preserve the agent's real facial identity from their photo exactly.

title: Agent (Magazine Cover)
description: Magazine cover with hands passing you phones and books
scene_description: Editorial magazine-cover portrait shot against a clean white gridded ceramic-tile wall (subtle grey grout lines), evoking a chic office/studio. The subject sits on a simple black chair, body angled away with the back/shoulder toward camera while the head turns back over the shoulder to meet the lens in a cool, confident half-glance. Subject wears a sharp oversized black blazer (matte, structured) for a monochrome silhouette. The scene is busy and playful: several disembodied arms in black sleeves intrude from the frame edges, each handing the subject a bright canary-yellow retro object — a vintage corded telephone handset (coiled yellow cord trailing down), a flip phone, an open Swiss-style graphic-design book (black/yellow spreads), and a low-profile mechanical keyboard with yellow accent keys. Camera: eye-level, ~50mm, medium-tight three-quarter framing from upper thighs up, shallow-to-medium depth. Lighting: bright, soft, even daylight-balanced studio light, minimal shadow. Palette: stark black + white with punchy yellow accents. Mood: bold, witty, hyper-busy "always working" personal brand.
text_treatment: Hero wordmark "agent." centered in the upper third: ultra-bold rounded lowercase geometric sans (Helvetica-Now/Circular weight), pure black, very large filling the width, with a white five-petal daisy flower replacing the dot/bowl over the "g". A solid black period sits after the word. Top-left corner: small black two-line tagline "Always On / Always Closing" in a plain medium sans. Top-right corner: small black right-aligned brand name in the same sans. A huge faint light-grey "PROPERTY" repeats as a ghosted watermark band across the mid and lower background behind the subject. Re-render arbitrary overlay text in this same hierarchy and styling.
clean_variant_note: Keep the white gridded tile wall empty and unobstructed in the upper third and corners where the wordmark, taglines, and ghosted "PROPERTY" watermark sat, so headline text can be cleanly composited on later.
subject_direction: Pose the agent seated, body turned away with one shoulder to camera, head swivelled back over the shoulder giving a calm, self-assured direct gaze; sharp oversized black blazer; relaxed half-smile or composed neutral expression. Preserve the agent's real facial identity exactly from their profile photo.

title: Play To Win
description: Crouched on a red crosswalk holding a football, shot from above
scene_description: High-angle outdoor portrait shot looking down at the subject crouched on one knee in the middle of a sun-bleached asphalt road painted with bold red-and-white pedestrian crossing stripes that recede diagonally across the frame. The subject kneels low to the ground, one knee down, body angled up toward the camera, tucking a soccer ball against the ribs with one bent arm while the other hand rests near it. They look straight up at the lens with a wide, warm, genuine open-mouthed smile. Vertical 9:16 portrait framing, full-body in view, camera positioned above and tilted down (drone/overhead-style perspective) with a slightly wide lens. Bright midday natural daylight, hard sun casting a long sharp shadow of the figure onto the crosswalk. Energetic, athletic, youthful sportswear editorial mood; saturated palette of crimson red, navy blue, soft denim blue and warm grey asphalt. Casual streetwear-athletic styling. Clean, confident, magazine-cover energy.
text_treatment: Headline set in an ultra-high-contrast bold serif (Didot/Bodoni style) with thin hairline serifs and heavy vertical strokes, all-caps. Rendered in a vivid magenta-pink. Placed as one single line spanning the full width across the very top of the frame, large and commanding, occupying roughly the top eighth; the subject's head sits just below the baseline so the type frames them like a magazine masthead. Generous letter-spacing, words separated evenly to fill edge-to-edge.
clean_variant_note: Top strip of the image should be empty open road/asphalt with the red-and-white crosswalk stripes continuing cleanly, no lettering, leaving a clear band where the masthead headline would later sit.
subject_direction: Pose the agent crouched on one knee, low to the ground, body angled up to an overhead camera, hugging a soccer ball to their side with one arm, beaming a wide genuine smile straight up at the lens. Casual athletic streetwear. Preserve the agent's real facial identity exactly from their profile photo.

title: Open Road
description: Laughing out the window of a vintage car at golden hour
scene_description: Cinematic golden-hour action shot of a vintage 1970s coupe in deep rust-orange driving down a city street, captured in a side three-quarter view with heavy horizontal motion blur on the road, wheels and background buildings to convey speed. The subject is the passenger, leaning out of the open rear/side window, forearm resting casually on the door sill, body twisted toward camera with a wide joyful open-mouth laugh, head slightly tilted, hair catching the wind. A second figure drives in the foreground, hands on the wheel, softly out of focus. Backdrop: warm red-brick walk-up buildings receding into a sun-flared street that blows out to bright white at the vanishing point. Lens feels like 50mm with shallow depth, strong backlight, lens flare, dust-and-haze atmosphere. Palette is warm and saturated: terracotta, amber, caramel browns, sunlit cream. Editorial, energetic, freedom-and-adventure mood; premium automotive-lifestyle photography.
text_treatment: Bold modern grotesque sans-serif (Helvetica/Arial-style), medium-heavy weight, near-black charcoal, sentence case. Four right-aligned lines stacked in the upper-right quadrant against the bright sky/sun-flared area, occupying roughly the top third and leaving the subject and car untouched below. Tight leading, generous line breaks splitting the sentences into four short phrases. High contrast against the blown-out warm-white background; no box or outline, type sits directly on the sky.
clean_variant_note: Keep the upper-right sky and sun-flared street area completely empty and bright (warm white blown-out highlight), with no text overlay, ready for fresh copy.
subject_direction: Pose the agent as the laughing passenger leaning out the car window, forearm on the door sill, body turned to camera, big genuine open-mouth smile, head tilted, hair/clothing windblown. Smart-casual cream or oatmeal knit sweater, optional warm-tinted sunglasses and small hoop or stud. Preserve the agent's real face exactly.

title: Deal Closed, Summer Earned
description: Shot from inside a glass of green smoothie — playful summer
scene_description: A surreal, playful summer beverage commercial shot, vertical poster format. The subject is seen from a striking low/inside angle, as if photographed from the bottom of a tall clear glass: the face is framed inside a perfect bright circular ring (the rim of the glass) opening onto a blue summer sky with sunlit green tree foliage at the top corners. The subject leans over the glass and sips through a thick translucent green straw that runs diagonally up from the lower-left to the lips at center frame. The entire surface around the circular opening is coated in vivid lime-green foamy fruit-juice or smoothie texture, glistening with bubbles and condensation droplets, which surrounds the head and shoulders like a frothy halo. The subject's upper body and hair are partly enveloped in the green foam. Wardrobe is hidden under the foam, so styling reads simply as a fresh, warm-skinned summer look. Camera: ultra-wide macro lens, slight fisheye distortion, shallow depth of field at the edges. Lighting is bright natural daylight, high-key. Palette: electric lime green, sky blue, warm skin tones. Mood: bold, fun, refreshing, high-end editorial advertising.
text_treatment: Two stacked lines of headline type fill the bottom quarter of the poster in an ultra-bold, tightly-tracked condensed grotesque sans (Helvetica/Druk-style heavy weight), all uppercase, pure white, with a period after each line. The lines are huge and edge-to-edge, the type baseline anchored to the very bottom, sitting directly over the green foam with no box or background. Line one ("BIG DEAL CLOSED.") and line two ("SUMMER EARNED.") are equal weight and width, tightly leaded so the two lines nearly touch. To re-render arbitrary text, keep this same massive bottom-anchored white condensed-bold all-caps treatment with trailing periods.
clean_variant_note: Same low-angle-through-the-glass green-foam-and-sky scene with the subject sipping the straw, but the bottom quarter left clean and free of any text, showing only the lime-green frothy foam there so headline type can be added later.
subject_direction: Pose the agent leaning forward and downward toward the camera, lips wrapped around the thick green straw at center frame, eyes looking slightly down into the lens with a calm, confident, refreshed expression. Keep their real facial identity from the profile photo intact; warm, approachable, polished real-estate-agent vibe.

title: Aerial Lounge
description: Overhead drone shot lying on a candy-coloured suburban lawn
scene_description: A surreal top-down aerial drone shot of a stylized suburban neighbourhood rendered in saturated candy colours: pastel pink, mint, blue and yellow toy-like houses with pitched roofs, manicured emerald-green lawns split into tidy grid plots by pale concrete paths, scattered palm trees, and a kidney-shaped turquoise swimming pool with loungers at upper-left. Centred in the largest lawn plot lies the single subject, photographed directly from above, full-body, lying flat on their back on the grass, legs straight and slightly apart, both arms bent up with hands cradled behind the head in a relaxed sunbathing pose, eyes closed, serene. The camera is a perfectly perpendicular overhead 90-degree angle, wide lens, subject filling the vertical centre of the frame. Bright midday sunlight casts short hard shadows. Playful, glossy, miniature-diorama editorial mood; vivid Wes-Anderson-meets-toytown colour palette; clean, symmetrical, graphic composition.
text_treatment: Tiny bold rounded sans-serif wordmark in bright spring-green, all-caps, set in a small box-logo style printed across the chest of the white t-shirt (not an overlay headline). It reads as merch branding occupying only a few percent of the frame, centred on the torso just below the open jacket collar. Replacement text should sit in the same chest position, same green rounded heavyweight type, small and centred, integrated as a printed garment graphic.
clean_variant_note: Keep the white crew-neck t-shirt plain and blank across the chest with no printed graphic or wordmark, so the overlay/merch text can be re-rendered cleanly later.
subject_direction: Pose the agent lying flat on their back on a green lawn, shot from directly overhead, eyes closed and calm, both hands tucked behind the head, legs straight. Dress them in an open multicolour colour-block knit cardigan over a plain white tee, tan chino trousers, white socks and brown leather loafers, plus a small cap. Preserve the agent's real facial identity from their photo.
